topPlaces.name: Political divisions of Kasaragod
topPlaces.description: Kasaragod district has four types of administrative hierarchies:

topPlaces.name: Kasaragod
topPlaces.description: Kasaragod (Malayalam: [kaːsɐrɐɡoːɖɨ̆] ) is a municipal town and the administrative headquarters of the Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India. Established in 1966, Kasaragod was the first municipal town in the district.

topPlaces.name: Thalangara
topPlaces.description: Thalangara is a part of Kasaragod Town, the district headquarters of the Kasaragod district in the South Indian state of Kerala. Malik Denar Juma Masjid and Dargah is located here.

topPlaces.name: Malik Dinar Mosque
topPlaces.description: The Malik Dinar Mosque, also known locally as the Malik Deenar Masjid and Malik Deenar Juma Masjid, and officially known as the Hazrath Malik Deenar Grand Juma Masjid, is a Sufi Sunni mosque and dargah, located in Thalangara, in the town of Kasaragod, in the state of Kerala, India. Founded by Malik Dinar and believed to been completed in c. 22 AH (642/643 CE), it is one of the oldest mosques in India.

topPlaces.name: Chemnad
topPlaces.description: Chemnad is a town in Kasaragod district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located east of Kasaragod town, across the Chandragiri River, and covers 8.3 square kilometres (3.2 sq mi) of land.

topPlaces.name: Nellikunnu Muhyaddin Juma Masjid
topPlaces.description: Muhyaddin Juma Masjid (Malayalam: മുഹ്യദ്ദീന്ജുമ മസ്ജിദ്), is a Sunni Friday mosque and dargah located at Nellikunnu, Kasaragod district, in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Nellikunnu
topPlaces.description: Nellikunnu is a locality in Kasaragod municipality. It is 2 km away from Kasaragod Town .

topPlaces.name: Vidyanagar, Kasaragod
topPlaces.description: Vidyanagar is a locality in Kasaragod municipality. It is located 5.6 km from Kasaragod Town at the National Highway 66 towards Kannur.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Political divisions of Kasaragod & around

items.note: Kasaragod district has four types of administrative hierarchies:

Kasaragod (Malayalam: [kaːsɐrɐɡoːɖɨ̆] ) is a municipal town and the administrative headquarters of the Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India. Established in 1966, Kasaragod was the first municipal town in the district.
Thalangara is a part of Kasaragod Town, the district headquarters of the Kasaragod district in the South Indian state of Kerala. Malik Denar Juma Masjid and Dargah is located here.

The Malik Dinar Mosque, also known locally as the Malik Deenar Masjid and Malik Deenar Juma Masjid, and officially known as the Hazrath Malik Deenar Grand Juma Masjid, is a Sufi Sunni mosque and dargah, located in Thalangara, in the town of Kasaragod, in the state of Kerala, India. Founded by Malik Dinar and believed to been completed in c. 22 AH (642/643 CE), it is one of the oldest mosques in India.
Chemnad is a town in Kasaragod district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located east of Kasaragod town, across the Chandragiri River, and covers 8.3 square kilometres (3.2 sq mi) of land.
Muhyaddin Juma Masjid (Malayalam: മുഹ്യദ്ദീന്ജുമ മസ്ജിദ്), is a Sunni Friday mosque and dargah located at Nellikunnu, Kasaragod district, in the state of Kerala, India.
Nellikunnu is a locality in Kasaragod municipality. It is 2 km away from Kasaragod Town .
Vidyanagar is a locality in Kasaragod municipality. It is located 5.6 km from Kasaragod Town at the National Highway 66 towards Kannur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Madhur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Madhur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (53 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (44 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Madhur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Madhur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Madhur?
faq.a: Stays in Madhur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Madhur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Political divisions of Kasaragod, Kasaragod, Thalangara, Malik Dinar Mosque, Chemnad.
